summary: Added createVault(marketId, tickSpacing, minimumFirstLiquidity) to LPVaultFactory — gated by onlyOracle, validates non-zero floor, rejects duplicate marketId, deploys EIP-1167 clone, registers it in vaultForMarket, initializes it, and emits VaultCreated. LPVault.initialize() now takes factory_ as a parameter, enforces msg.sender == factory_ for defense-in-depth on top of the one-shot initializer, sets phase=Active, and approves the exchange on USDC (max) and ConditionalTokens (setApprovalForAll). Added setMinimumFirstLiquidity(newMin) onlyOracle with a zero guard and MinimumFirstLiquidityUpdated event. Adjusted the UC-REQ0 test file to pass the new factory_ param to initialize() and to use minimal MockERC20/MockConditionalTokens contracts for the approve/setApprovalForAll calls. Mutation check: 19/22 T-002 tests turned RED when createVault/initialize/setMinimumFirstLiquidity were replaced with revert(MUTANT). Coverage: LPVault.sol 87.88%, LPVaultFactory.sol 100% — both above the 80% threshold.
